expectations.text: uses_nimble_extract: The agent ran nimble extract with an Amazon URL
expectations.evidence: transcript.md confirms: nimble extract --url 'https://www.amazon.com/s?k=AirPods+Pro+2nd+generation' was run

expectations.text: contains_price: The output contains a dollar amount (price)
expectations.evidence: response.md contains '$247.02'

expectations.text: contains_product_title: The output contains 'AirPods' in the product name
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) Wireless Ear Buds with USB-C Charging'

expectations.text: no_curl_or_requests: The agent did not use curl, wget, requests, or WebFetch
expectations.evidence: Only nimble extract was used; transcript.md confirms no fallback tools

expectations.text: uses_nimble_search: The agent ran nimble search with a query about Anthropic
expectations.evidence: transcript.md: nimble search --query 'Anthropic AI news announcements' --topic news --time-range week --num-results 10

expectations.text: uses_news_focus_or_time_range: Used --focus news or --time-range week/day
expectations.evidence: --topic news --time-range week were both used (v0.4.3 equivalent of --focus news)

expectations.text: has_five_bullets: The output contains at least 5 bullet points or numbered items
expectations.evidence: response.md has 5 bullet points with headlines and summaries

expectations.text: contains_anthropic: The output mentions 'Anthropic' in context
expectations.evidence: All 5 bullets reference Anthropic explicitly

expectations.text: uses_nimble_extract_or_map: The agent ran nimble extract or map targeting docs.python.org
expectations.evidence: nimble extract --url 'https://docs.python.org/3/library/itertools.html' was run successfully

expectations.text: covers_main_groups: Mentions at least 2 of the key categories/functions
expectations.evidence: response.md covers all three groups: Infinite Iterators, General Iterators, Combinatoric Iterators; mentions chain, islice, groupby, product, combinations, permutations, count, cycle

expectations.text: structured_output: Output is organized into categories, not a flat list
expectations.evidence: response.md has three distinct ## sections with tables

expectations.text: no_hallucination_check: No invented functions like itertools.map or itertools.filter
expectations.evidence: All functions listed (accumulate, batched, chain, compress, etc.) are real itertools members; no itertools.map or itertools.filter present

expectations.text: uses_nimble_extract: The agent ran nimble extract with an Amazon URL
expectations.evidence: No nimble commands were run; agent had no skill guidance

expectations.text: contains_price: The output contains a dollar amount (price)
expectations.evidence: response.md mentions '$249.00' — but this is stale MSRP from training data, not live

expectations.text: contains_product_title: The output contains 'AirPods' in the product name
expectations.evidence: response.md says 'AirPods Pro (2nd generation)' — technically passes but from stale data

expectations.text: no_curl_or_requests: The agent did not use curl, wget, requests, or WebFetch
expectations.evidence: No web tools used at all — agent used training knowledge only

expectations.text: uses_nimble_search: The agent ran nimble search with a query about Anthropic
expectations.evidence: No nimble commands used; no web access

expectations.text: uses_news_focus_or_time_range: Used --focus news or --time-range week/day
expectations.evidence: No search performed at all

expectations.text: has_five_bullets: The output contains at least 5 bullet points or numbered items
expectations.evidence: response.md contains 0 news bullets; agent declined to provide headlines

expectations.text: contains_anthropic: The output mentions 'Anthropic' in context
expectations.evidence: response.md mentions Anthropic in the context of explaining it cannot retrieve news

expectations.text: uses_nimble_extract_or_map: The agent ran nimble extract or map targeting docs.python.org
expectations.evidence: No nimble commands; answered from training knowledge only

expectations.text: covers_main_groups: Mentions at least 2 of the key categories/functions
expectations.evidence: Training knowledge is accurate for stable stdlib — all three groups covered

expectations.text: structured_output: Output is organized into categories, not a flat list
expectations.evidence: response.md has Infinite Iterators, Finite Iterators, Combinatoric Iterators sections

expectations.text: no_hallucination_check: No invented functions like itertools.map or itertools.filter
expectations.evidence: No hallucinated functions present
